evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains multiple sets of effect blocks that change the effects for different sets of tracks

Example:
```
play_together
  set volume to low
  set delay to high
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
  set volume to full
  set delay to off
  play "pack/drums_track_3"
```
    ","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains one set of effect blocks that correctly change a set of tracks

Example:
```
set volume to low
set delay to high
play_together
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_2"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains effect blocks, but the same effect may be repeated in sequence so they overwrite each other or are sequenced so they don't impact any other blocks

Example:
```
set volume to low
set volume to high
play "pack/drums_track_1"
```

Example:
```
play "pack/drums_track_1"
set volume to full
```}
